versioning_decision: Bumped TIP document version from 1.0.3 to 1.0.4 and added a changelog entry because issue #11 is a backward-compatible additive clarification: verified is retained and the new exists_verified/integrity_verified booleans are optional.
findings: Fail-fast preconditions passed: schemas/tip-response.schema.json parsed with jq, and TEZ_INTERROGATION_PROTOCOL.md contains sections 5.5 and 6.5.
Issue #11 was implemented as an existence/integrity floor below semantic verification. Issue #5 was referenced only for composition and was not implemented.
